Title: Requires any county, city, town or village that intends to install a traffic-control device outfitted with a camera provide public notice that they are installing a traffic-control device outfitted with a camera
Summary: Requires any county, city, town or village that intends to install a traffic-control device outfitted with a camera provide public notice that they are installing a traffic-control device outfitted with a camera.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the vehicle and traffic law, in relation to requiring municipalities provide notice to the public when installing traffic-control devices outfitted with cameras
